description: Wind Power LLC is expanding its operations to British Columbia, Canada. Your job is to configure the ERP system to handle Canadian taxes and process the first order. First, navigate to the Chart of Accounts and create two new child accounts under 'Duties and Taxes - WP': 'GST Payable' (Account Type: Tax) and 'PST Payable' (Account Type: Tax). Second, create a new Sales Taxes and Charges Template named 'British Columbia Tax' with two rows applied 'On Net Total': 5% for GST Payable and 7% for PST Payable. Finally, create and submit a Sales Order for customer 'Maple Leaf Wind' for 2 units of 'Wind Turbine'. Apply the 'British Columbia Tax' template to the order. Verify the taxes calculate correctly (Base: $10,000, Tax: $1,200, Grand Total: $11,200). Log into ERPNext at http://localhost:8080 with credentials Administrator / admin.
